headline: Trane Technologies Unveils the World’s Largest HVAC Training Center
summary: SWORDS, Ireland, April 16, 2026--Trane Technologies (NYSE:TT), a global climate innovator, today celebrated the launch of its new Trane Advanced Technology Training Center (ATTC), a state-of-the-art facility designed to shape the future of the commercial HVAC technician workforce. The 45,000‑square‑foot facility – the largest and most technologically advanced of its kind in the world – is located at the company’s North America headquarters in Davidson, North Carolina.

headline: Madison Air Stock Pops Nearly 18% in Trading Debut. Here’s What to Know About 2026’s Biggest IPO.
summary: The company became the biggest initial public offering of 2026 on Thursday, pricing at the high end of its range at $27 a share.

headline: 6 Stocks That Can Benefit From the Massive Amount of Water That AI Data Centers Need
summary: Water, water everywhere, but…is too much going to artificial-intelligence data centers?  With expected earnings growth and its recent valuation, shares could fetch about $470 in a year, up 19% from recent levels.
